猜想.摘要: Round-budget closure at round 20/20 keeps 'TICT' ahead of 'ICT'. The main unresolved gap remains: The unresolved main gap is absence of successful orthogonal verifier supplementation or another closure-grade pairwise discriminator for TICT versus ICT; the final call therefore relies mainly on internal evidence.

最终证据摘要: Current top1 is TICT at 0.66 and top2 is ICT at 0.17. The verifier evidence is interpreted as operational failure with no scientific content: it returned zero usable evidence cards and therefore neither supports nor contradicts the current lead. Because it adds no substantive evidence, it does not reduce portfolio coverage debt; however, portfolio coverage debt was already zero, so the case legitimately remains in pairwise contraction rather than reverting to portfolio screening. No still-credible hypothesis remains untested, but ICT remains only indirectly weakened rather than orthogonally ruled out. Closure justification is still collecting from internal evidence and verifier supplementation for the current pair remains missing. Given the round budget is exhausted and portfolio screening is complete, the case is ready for best-available finalize, not decisive finalize.

The final bounded verifier attempt was the highest-value remaining orthogonal action for TICT versus ICT, but it failed operationally and cannot be repeated within the round budget.
Internal closure justification leans toward TICT based on repeated torsion-sensitive and conformer-compatible evidence, but it never reached decisive orthogonal closure before the round budget ended.

Portfolio screening remains complete. All five labels have been directly screened or retired with reason, so the case legitimately stays in pairwise contraction. At round 20 of 20 with one round remaining including the current one, no further follow-up can be scheduled safely; the case must close on best available evidence.

Macro capability is saturated because portfolio coverage was completed earlier. Microscopic produced the main informative signal but with diminishing returns from repeated torsion/conformer routes. Verifier remained the only plausible orthogonal route, but the final attempt failed operationally due to credit/token limits and yielded no usable evidence. Round budget exhausted at round 20/20; no additional specialized-agent execution can be scheduled beyond this point.

Latest internal evidence: a new bounded Amesp torsion_snapshot_follow_up on central aryl-vinyl dihedral dih_13_14_15_16 added fresh torsion-sensitive evidence compatible with twisting-enabled CT accessibility and did not restore a planar ICT advantage. Latest verifier evidence: no usable external evidence was returned; retrieval failed with 0 evidence cards and an operational credit/token limitation.
